programme.title: The Valley
programme.sub-title: The Biggest Snake in the Grass
programme.desc: Tensions boil between Jasmine, Janet and Jason; Zack starts to realize that his friendship with Brittany has shifted; the rumor Kristen started continues to wreak havoc in the friend group; Brittany uncovers a shocking breach of privacy by Jax.

programme.title: The Valley
programme.desc: Kristen and Luke's housewarming takes a turn; Brittany prepares for Jax's return by meeting with a divorce attorney; Jasmine and Melissa try to mend things with Jason and Janet; Danny is accused of overindulging again.

programme.title: The Valley
programme.desc: Jax becomes upset when he finds out about the party at Britt's; the guys take Jax to a dinner that leads to a confrontation between Jason and Danny; the tension between Nia and Janet comes to a head; Jax is blindsided by a special delivery.

programme.title: The Valley
programme.desc: Luke finalizes plans for a trip to Hawaii where he plans to propose to Kristen; Janet, Michelle, Kristen and Nia butt heads during a girl's night out; Jesse confronts Aaron about the timeline of his relationship with Michelle.

programme.title: The Valley
programme.desc: Unknown to Kristen, Luke plans to pop the question on a planned fishing trip; Brittany feels hurt and left out when she learns she isn't a part of Kristen's proposal; Janet threatens to leave the trip early when she finds out it was all a cover.

programme.title: The Valley
programme.desc: Jax spoils Kristen and Luke's engagement after Brittany reveals the news to him; Kristen and Zack are fed up with Brittany always choosing Janet over them; all hell breaks loose on a sunset cruise when Janet and Kristen reach their breaking points.

programme.title: The Valley
programme.desc: Brittany takes the first step toward regaining her self-confidence with a mommy makeover consultation; Jasmine's growing friendship with Lala is tested on a girls' night out, leaving Michelle in the middle.

programme.title: The Valley
programme.desc: Danny and Nia continue to struggle with their newborn daughter refusing a bottle; as Kristen grapples with postpartum blues, her relationship with Luke is tested when their first date night out without Kaia turns into a disaster.

programme.title: The Valley
programme.desc: Janet's game night olive branch yields mixed results; Jesse gives Lacy a divorce update in hopes of taking things to the next level; Kristen and Luke continue to struggle with their communication.

programme.desc: Following the lives of powerhouse boss Leva Bonaparte and her staff at Republic Garden & Lounge, the hottest nightclub in Charleston, South Carolina.

programme.desc: Tensions at Longleat continue as Margo's sharp words strike a nerve with Mark-Francis, sending ripples of friction through the group; as the others enjoy a day out in Cheddar, Margo suffers an emotional breakdown.

programme.desc: Kellyoke Encore: "Time"; Chris O'Donnell; Helen J. Shen; Kelly Extra: Luke Thompson; Kelly Extra: Yerin Ha; Taj Mahal performs; WIL: Ring falls off bridge.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Unlock: The Best Way to Find Out; Truth: Secrets Revealed After Mom's Death
programme.desc: Crystal learned that her boyfriend, Kelon, cheated during their first year together, and though she took him back, she's now questioning whether that was a mistake; London and Joshua grew up believing they were siblings but have recently discovered that they may not be related at all, and after everything they've been through together, the possibility of not being sister and brother is heartbreaking.

programme.title: Ladies of London: The New Reign
programme.desc: London's summer season kicks off at a glamourous garden party hosted by Mark-Francis, where rumors begin to swirl.

programme.title: Ladies of London: The New Reign
programme.sub-title: I Know What You Did Last Summer
programme.desc: Lottie and Joshua celebrate her pregnancy with a photoshoot as Myka juggles the challenges of solo parenting.

programme.title: Ladies of London: The New Reign
programme.desc: Martha digs through long-forgotten boxes from her past, unearthing memories; Myka sits down with Dara; Missè organizes a day of wine tasting and bonding.

programme.title: Ladies of London: The New Reign
programme.desc: Lottie and Joshua shop for the perfect push present; as a health scare rattles her, Emma turns to Mark-Francis for comfort and reassurance; Kimi hosts a glamorous art party, but the celebration takes a sharp turn when she's confronted about her behavior.

programme.title: Ladies of London: The New Reign
programme.desc: Myka embarks on a new business built on kindness; Lottie and Joshua host a gender reveal for their families; Margo and Emma throw competing dinner parties where Mark-Francis spreads a rumor about Margo, leaving Martha caught between her two best friends.

programme.title: Ladies of London: The New Reign
programme.desc: Health news lands and a fancy picnic turns tense when Margo calls out Mark-Francis.

programme.title: Ladies of London: The New Reign
programme.desc: "Ladies of London" is back with a new wave of British blue bloods, ambitious American expats and glamorous international socialites.

programme.title: Ladies of London: The New Reign
programme.desc: The ladies trade the bustle of London for a lavish retreat at the magnificent Longleat House, anticipating a weekend of elegance, adventure and indulgence; the calm of the countryside soon begins to fray, however, as long-simmering tensions between Margo and Mark-Francis resurface, threatening to turn their refined escape into an uncomfortable clash.

programme.title: Ladies of London: The New Reign
programme.desc: Tensions at Longleat continue as Margo's sharp words strike a nerve with Mark-Francis, sending ripples of friction through the group; as the others enjoy a day out in Cheddar, Margo suffers an emotional breakdown.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: DNA: 3 Tests for the Truth; Update: DNA: Multiple Men Could Be the Dad!
programme.desc: Shazique says his ex, Tatiana, told him he was the father of three of her children until she abruptly changed her story, but his girlfriend Tammy says that Tatiana is bitter about his new relationship and is being vindictive; Amari believed that Marty could be the father of her baby, but it turned out that he wasn't, so she returns, saying that another mystery man, Dontavius, could be the father!

programme.title: Summer House
programme.desc: After traveling extensively for Loverboy and his budding DJ career work, Kyle hopes to spend the summer catching up with his wife, but is Amanda on the same page?; a few fresh faces shake things up and catch the eyes of some in the house; Ciara's chill vibes give West hope about rekindling their friendship.
